scope: wave2 fan-out migration: 2 of the 3 legacy-parity read streams (outbound_messages, inbound_messages); the 'servers' stream is blocked (see Known limits) and the full Postmark surface (templates, bounces, stats, suppressions) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: this stream needs a different auth header (X-Postmark-Account-Token) than the two migrated message streams (X-Postmark-Server-Token); the engine's auth/headers are resolved once per bundle at Runtime construction with no per-stream override, so a single bundle cannot select a different credential header by stream name. See docs.md Known limits and this migration's reported blocker.
